name: io.github.BetterDB-inc/monitor
description: BetterDB MCP server - Valkey and Redis observability for Claude Code and other MCP clients

arguments.name: --autostart
arguments.description: Automatically spawn and manage a local BetterDB monitor process on startup

arguments.name: --persist
arguments.description: Keep the monitor process running after the MCP server exits (requires --autostart)

arguments.name: --port
arguments.description: Port for the auto-started monitor API

arguments.name: --storage
arguments.description: Storage backend for the auto-started monitor

arguments.name: --stop
arguments.description: Stop a previously persisted monitor process and exit

environmentVariables.description: URL of the BetterDB monitor instance
environmentVariables.name: BETTERDB_URL

environmentVariables.description: MCP authentication token generated from the BetterDB Settings page
environmentVariables.name: BETTERDB_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Instance ID to target when using multi-instance cloud deployments
environmentVariables.name: BETTERDB_INSTANCE_ID
